description: Indulge in the luxury of pure leather with this pair of shoes from enroute. In a classic silhouette and with ample cushioning, this derby makes for a fabulous addition to your wardrobe. This pair comes with a shoe bag Upper Full grain leather upper with supple leather inner lining for comfort Decorative perforations on the forefoot and reinforced overlays on the heel for enhanced shoe structure Padded footbed for all-day comfort Midsole EVA midsole for impact protection Outsole TPU outsole with textured pattern and a raised heel for ergonomic comfort and style Shoe care Wipe surface with a clean and dry cloth to remove dust Use a branded leather conditioner Do not store in direct sunlight
